name: Mean Reversion
description: Reversal model that buys after a fresh upside spike in a down base trend and sells after a fresh downside spike in an up base trend.

trigger: Long when the base trend is down, price prints a fresh upside spike, and there has not been another upside spike recently.
Short when the base trend is up, price prints a fresh downside spike, and there has not been another downside spike recently.

earlyExit: Long exit when the base trend flips back up.
Short exit when the base trend flips back down.

checks.label: Price just printed an upside spike
There has not been another upside spike recently
Price just printed a downside spike
There has not been another downside spike recently
The base trend has flipped back up
The base trend has flipped back down
